Article Title: IPL match Live streaming March 29: When and where to watch MI vs KKR today match online and on TV
Article Text:
MI vs KKR (BCCI Photo)

Watch Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner

IPL 2026 MI vs KKR: Live streaming details - Match Time, Date, and Venue

Where will the MI vs KKR IPL 2026 match be played?

IPL 2026, MI vs KKR: Full squads

Mumbai Indians:

Kolkata Knight Riders:

NEW DELHI: Five-time champions Mumbai Indians will look to begin their IPL 2026 campaign on a strong note when they take on three-time winners Kolkata Knight Riders at the iconic Wankhede Stadium on Sunday. Hardik Pandya will continue to lead MI for the third consecutive season, while Ajinkya Rahane captains KKR in what promises to be an exciting contest.Mumbai Indians enter the season with a clear objective, and that is to clinch their sixth IPL title and end a trophy drought that dates back to 2020. They showed resilience last year by reaching the playoffs, but their journey ended in Qualifier 2 after a loss to Punjab Kings.With a strong core featuring Rohit Sharma, Jasprit Bumrah, Suryakumar Yadav, and Trent Boult, MI look like a balanced and formidable unit on paper, capable of mounting a serious title challenge.On the other hand, Kolkata Knight Riders will aim for a fresh start after a disappointing campaign last season, where they finished eighth despite entering as defending champions. Rahane will rely on key players such as Cameron Green, Sunil Narine, Varun Chakravarthy, and Finn Allen to turn things around.Notably, this season marks a major transition for KKR as they move forward without long-time match-winner Andre Russell, signaling the end of a significant era for the franchise.The match between Mumbai Indians and Kolkata Knight Riders will take place at Wankhede Stadium, Mumbai.The much-anticipated clash is scheduled for Sunday, March 29.The match will begin at 7:30 PM IST.The match will be telecast live on Star Sports Network, while live streaming will be available on JioHotstar across mobile devices, laptops, and smart TVs in multiple languages.Hardik Pandya (Captain), Rohit Sharma, Suryakumar Yadav, Tilak Varma, Ryan Rickleton, Robin Minz, Mitchell Santner, Corbin Bosch, Naman Dhir, Jasprit Bumrah, Trent Boult, Allah Ghafanzar, Ashwani Kumar, Deepak Chahar, Will Jacks, Raghu Sharma, Raj Angad Bawa, Sherfane Rutherford, Mayank Markande, Shardul Thakur, Quinton de Kock, Mohammad Izhar, Danish Malewar, Atharva Ankolekar, Mayank Rawat.Ajinkya Rahane (capt), Manish Pandey, Rovman Powell, Angkrish Raghuvanshi, Ramandeep Singh, Rinku Singh, Sunil Narine, Anukul Roy, Vaibhav Arora, Harshit Rana, Umran Malik, Varun Chakaravarthy, Cameron Green, Finn Allen, Matheesha Pathirana, Kartik Tyagi, Rahul Tripathi, Tim Seifert, Tejasvi Dahiya, Sarthak Ranjan, Rachin Ravindra, Akash Deep, Prashant Solanki, Daksh Kamra.
Article Summary: Five-time champions mumbai indians take on three-time winners kolkata knight riders. Match will be telecast live on star sports network, while live streaming will be available on jiohotstar. Hardik pandya will continue to lead mi for third consecutive season. Ajinkya rahane captains kkr in what promises to be an exciting contest.

Article Title: Tiger Woods net worth in 2026, inside his golf career, earnings, and major car crash incidents over the years
Article Text:
Tiger Woods net worth in 2026, Inside his golf career, earnings, and major car crash incidents over the years (Image via getty)

Tiger Woods’ golf career, major wins, and how his income grew beyond the sport

Watch Tiger Woods Arrest Drama: Bloodshot Eyes In Mugshot, Crash Scene Photo Goes Viral, Trump Responds Tiger Woods Arrest Drama: Bloodshot Eyes In Mugshot, Crash Scene Photo Goes Viral, Trump Responds

Tiger Woods’ car crash incidents in 2009 and 2021 and how they changed his life and career

Tiger Woods’ 2026 car crash and arrest in Florida add new chapter to his off course struggles

Tiger Woods has built a net worth of about $1.5 billion in 2026. That makes him the richest golfer ever. Even now, when he plays less due to injuries, his money keeps growing. Most of it does not come from golf wins anymore. It comes from big brand deals, smart business moves, and long-term investments. His journey is not just about trophies. It also includes serious injuries and car crashes that changed his life.Tiger Woods started young, but everything changed in 1997 when he won the Masters at just 21. That win made him a global star overnight. After that, he kept winning. Over the years, he reached 82 PGA Tour wins and 15 major titles, which puts him among the greatest in golf history.On the course, he earned around $121 million in prize money. That sounds huge, but it is only a small part of his total wealth. Most of his money came from brands. His long deal with Nike alone brought in hundreds of millions. Even after that partnership ended, he stayed strong in business.Now, he runs his own clothing brand, Sun Day Red. He is also part of the TGL indoor golf league. These ventures keep his income steady. Reports say he still earns over $70 million a year, mostly from off-course work.His company, TGR Ventures, also plays a big role. It handles his investments, golf design projects, and media work. This is why his money keeps growing even when he is not playing much.Tiger Woods’ life has also seen difficult moments, especially with car crashes. The first major one happened in 2009 outside his Florida home. His SUV hit a fire hydrant and a tree. No serious injuries were reported, but the incident brought heavy media attention and personal troubles.The more serious crash happened on February 23, 2021, near Los Angeles. His car rolled over at high speed on a curved road. According to the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Office, there was no alcohol involved. The main cause was high speed.This crash left him with severe leg injuries. Doctors had to insert rods, screws, and pins to stabilize his right leg. For a while, it was not clear if he would walk properly again, let alone play golf.But Tiger Woods returned. In 2022, he played at the Masters again. He walked the course with visible pain but strong determination. Since then, he has played limited events, choosing his schedule carefully. These accidents slowed his playing career, but they did not stop his financial growth. In fact, they pushed him to focus more on business and long-term plans.As of March 27, 2026, Tiger Woods was involved in another car crash near his home in Jupiter Island, Florida, and this time it led to his arrest. According to the Martin County Sheriff’s Office and reports from ESPN and Reuters, Woods was driving a Land Rover at high speed when it clipped a truck’s trailer and rolled over.He was not seriously injured, but officers said he showed signs of impairment and arrested him on suspicion of DUI. A breath test did not show alcohol, but police believe medication or drugs may be involved, and he also refused to take a urine test. He now faces misdemeanor charges, including DUI, property damage, and refusal to submit to testing.
Article Summary: Tiger woods has built a net worth of about $1.5 billion in 2026. That makes him the richest golfer ever. Most of it does not come from golf wins anymore. It comes from big brand deals, smart business moves, and long-term investments. His journey is not just about trophies. It also includes serious injuries and car crashes that changed his life.

Article Title: ‘No words for Virat Kohli’: Rajat Patidar hails RCB star after emphatic win
Article Text:
RCB's Virat Kohli, left, and Rajat Patidar during the IPL 2026 opener. (AP Photo)

Watch Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner Greenstone Lobo predicts IPL 2026 winner

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

‘Everyone chipped in’

Opposition takes note of Kohli threat

NEW DELHI: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru kicked off IPL 2026 in style, but skipper Rajat Patidar made it clear who stood at the heart of their dominant six-wicket win over Sunrisers Hyderabad — Virat Kohli Chasing 202 at the M Chinnaswamy stadium, Kohli’s unbeaten 69 and Devdutt Padikkal’s explosive 61 powered RCB to victory with 26 balls to spare.Patidar didn’t hold back in his admiration, calling Kohli the backbone of any chase. “No words can describe Virat Kohli. When he is in, the team is always in the chase. He is the No. 1 batter,” he said.The RCB captain credited Kohli and Padikkal for laying the foundation of the chase, dismissing suggestions of a pre-set aggressive template.“Not a policy, we assessed the wicket and it was good. Padikkal’s and Kohli’s innings were the base,” he explained.While Kohli’s knock headlined the chase, Patidar highlighted the collective effort behind the win. “The way boys played, and this was a season opener, everyone chipped in and did the job,” he said.A key turning point, according to him, was the powerplay spell from debutant Jacob Duffy , who reduced SRH to 29/3. “Duffy was playing his first game, and the way he played and the wickets he took were the turning point,” Patidar noted.He also reserved praise for Phil Salt’s stunning effort in the field. “That was a terrific catch by Salt. Even I was surprised, but he is a great fielder,” he said.Patidar himself contributed a quickfire 31 off 12 balls and revealed his intent was simple: “I wanted to create a lot of impact… I just wanted to have a lot of impact.”SRH skipper Ishan Kishan also acknowledged Kohli’s decisive role. “It was very important to get his wicket as soon as possible. Otherwise, if he keeps going, it's hard to stop him,” he admitted.With RCB starting their title defence in emphatic fashion, Patidar’s words echoed the mood in Bengaluru — when Kohli is in full flow, the chase is never out of reach.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru beat sunrisers hyderabad by six wickets in ipl 2026 opener. Rcb captain rajat patidar says virat kohli is the backbone of any chase. ‘everyone chipped in and did the job,’ says patidars.

Article Title: Novak Djokovic enters 2026 as wife Jelena shares unseen family photos and emotional New Year message
Article Text:
Novak Djokovic enters 2026 as wife Jelena shares unseen family photos and emotional New Year message (Image via Getty)

Novak Djokovic set to start 2026 season at the Adelaide International before Australian Open







As 2026 begins, Novak Djokovic and his wife Jelena Djokovic gave fans a quiet but touching moment. Jelena welcomed the new year by sharing unseen photos from their private life. The pictures showed Novak, their children, and close family moments from 2025. Along with the images, she posted a heartfelt message about love, growth, and gratitude. Jelena’s words came at a time when Novak is getting ready for another long tennis season. While many top players have already traveled to Australia, Djokovic is still spending time with family before the tour begins. The post quickly drew attention because Jelena rarely shares personal pictures. It reminded fans that behind the trophies and matches, family remains Novak’s biggest support system.Novak Djokovic and Jelena Djokovic have been together since their teenage years. They married in 2014 and are parents to two children, Stefan and Tara. Over the years, Jelena has stayed by Novak’s side through wins, losses, injuries, and big career moments. Her New Year message showed that same steady support as they step into 2026 together.Jelena wrote on Instagram,“Ah 2025! So much to be grateful for Love, family, friendship, nature… they make life deeper, sweeter, and endlessly more meaningful.Wishing everyone health, love, and joy. May we keep growing into better, kinder versions of ourselves.”She added,“I used to think that the quote ‘I never want to grow up’ from Peter Pan was my childhood mantra. But I did grow up and ‘I never want to stop growing’ is the wish I hold for myself and for all of you. Much love, and God bless you.”While family moments made headlines, Novak Djokovic is also focused on tennis. The new season begins with events like the United Cup on January 2 and the Brisbane International soon after. Djokovic has chosen not to play in the opening week.Instead, he will begin his 2026 season at the Adelaide International, scheduled from January 12 to January 17, according to the ATP calendar. This will be his first time starting a season in Adelaide and his first time playing a warm-up event so close to the Australian Open since 2009.After Adelaide, Djokovic will move to Melbourne with one clear goal. He is chasing a record-setting 25th Grand Slam title at the Australian Open. In 2025, his run at the majors ended in the semifinals, falling short of another title. Still, his form and experience keep him among the favorites every year. His entry and seeding details will be confirmed closer to the tournament by the ATP.Jelena Djokovic’s message showed calm and reflection, while Novak Djokovic prepares for another demanding season. Together, they step into 2026 with family first and tennis close behind.Also Read: Novak Djokovic And Jelena Djokovic Combined Net Worth In 2025: Tennis Legend, Career, Family, And Business Income Explored
Article Summary: Novak djokovic and his wife jelena welcomed the new year by sharing unseen photos from their private life. The pictures showed novak, their children, and close family moments from 2025. Along with the images, she posted a heartfelt message about love, growth, and gratitude.

Article Title: NFL Trade Rumors: Indianapolis Colts linked to blockbuster move for $160 million defensive superstar
Article Text:
The Indianapolis Colts are exploring options to fix their struggling pass rush after missing out on Trey Hendrickson. Trade buzz around Myles Garrett has linked him to Indianapolis, especially with a potential rule change easing future draft pick trades. With cap space and urgency, the Colts could pursue a bold move to land an elite defensive playmaker.

Colts emerge as surprise landing spot for Myles Garrett

The Indianapolis Colts entered the offseason with a clear goal: fix a pass rush that failed to deliver when it mattered most. They had a plan, and for a moment, it looked like it would work. A strong push for Trey Hendrickson signaled intent. But in a league where deals shift overnight, that opportunity slipped away, leaving Indianapolis searching again for a game-changing presence on the edge.Now, a bigger and far more intriguing possibility is quietly gaining traction. Trade chatter surrounding Myles Garrett has resurfaced, and while nothing is confirmed, the idea alone is enough to stir excitement.For a team sitting on decent cap space and a pressing defensive need, this is not just another rumor. It could be a turning point.The connection between the Colts and Garrett is not random speculation. It ties into a broader league conversation, including a proposed rule that would allow teams to trade draft picks further into the future. If approved, it could open doors for aggressive franchises willing to sacrifice tomorrow for a stronger today.That is exactly where Indianapolis fits in.As Sports Illustrated’s Conor Orr put it: “Let’s imagine for a second that the Browns’ rule proposal of extending tradable draft picks out to five years is tied to their desire to deal Garrett. Which teams would that most reasonably impact in terms of potential suitors for him?""The Colts do not have first-round picks in this year’s draft or next year’s, thanks to the Sauce Gardner move, and are clearly enamored with the current roster—enough so that signing Daniel Jones and Alec Pierce to big deals made sense to them,” Orr wrote.“If you’re Carlie Irsay-Gordon, what is another two years of draft capital at this point if the return is a player who could actually turn the Colts into a contender?… The Colts were 30th in pass rush win rate last season and were heavily dependent on Laiatu Latu for generating quarterback pressures.”That last point hits hardest. Indianapolis ranked near the bottom in creating pressure, a weakness that showed up repeatedly on Sundays. Garrett, meanwhile, continues to perform at an elite level, producing sacks in bunches and disrupting offenses almost single-handedly.Even with additions like Arden Key and Michael Clemons, the Colts still lack a true defensive centerpiece. Garrett would instantly fill that void.Yes, he is older than the team’s stated goal of getting younger. But elite production often outweighs age, especially for a team trying to move from competitive to dangerous.If the opportunity becomes real, this is not a decision that calls for caution. It calls for conviction.
Article Summary: The indianapolis colts are exploring options to fix their pass rush. Trade buzz around myles garrett has linked him to indianapolis, especially with a potential rule change easing future draft pick trades. With cap space and urgency, the colts could pursue a bold move to land an elite defensive playmaker.

Article Title: IPL 2026: MS Dhoni ruled out for 2 weeks; Chennai Super Kings suffer massive blow
Article Text:
MS Dhoni (Image credit: CSK/IPL)

Watch IPL 2026: Mukesh Kumar on Shami’s influence & India comeback plans IPL 2026: Mukesh Kumar on Shami’s influence & India comeback plans

Poll Who do you think will take the lead in CSK in absence of Dhoni? Ruturaj Gaikwad Sanju Samson

NEW DELHI: Chennai Super Kings have suffered a major setback as their star wicketkeeper-batter MS Dhoni has been ruled out for two weeks due to a calf strain. CSK released a statement confirming the development."MS Dhoni is currently undergoing rehabilitation for a calf strain. As a result, he is likely to miss the first two weeks of TATA IPL 2026. Get well soon, Thala!," CSK said.CSK will kick off their IPL 2026 campaign against Rajasthan Royals in Guwahati.Speculation that IPL 2026 could be Dhoni’s last season has gathered pace following news of his injury. In addition to the calf strain, Dhoni has also been dealing with persistent knee issues.Dhoni had acknowledged his declining fitness during the ‘ROAR 26’ fan event at Chepauk recently, saying that "it is on the way down".With Ruturaj Gaikwad leading the franchise for some time, CSK have also strengthened their wicketkeeping options by bringing in Sanju Samson and investing Rs 14.20 crore in uncapped wicketkeeper-batter Kartik Sharma.In 278 matches, Dhoni has scored 5,439 runs in 242 innings at an average of 38.30 and a strike rate of 137.45, including 24 fifties, with a highest score of 84*.He is the sixth-highest run-getter in the tournament’s history.Also See: IPL Live Score
Article Summary: Csk wicketkeeper-batter ms dhoni ruled out for two weeks with calf strain. Csk will kick off their ipl 2026 campaign against rajasthan royals in guwahati. Dhoni has scored 5,439 runs in 242 innings at an average of 38.30.

Article Title: Luka Doncic failed to escape nightmarish punishment this time as Lakers star gets ugly news amid breakup with ex-fiancée
Article Text:
Luka Doncic. Image via: Kirby Lee-Imagn Images

Luka Doncic receives a one-game suspension following his 16th technical foul



What's next for Luka Doncic?



Luka Doncic is now in the Los Angeles Lakers (Image via Instagram / @lukadoncic)

Luka Doncic's suspension finally caught up with him, and this time, there was no late escape. The Los Angeles Lakers star had flirted with the line for weeks, picking up technical after technical while somehow staying just on the right side of a ban. That cushion is gone now. It was a comfortable 116-99 win for the Los Angeles Lakers over the Brooklyn Nets, which quickly turned into a costly one for both Doncic and, of course, the team.There was a sense this moment had been building. Even as Doncic dominated games through March, piling up points and carrying the Lakers up the Western Conference standings. Still, the tension with officials never really eased. On Friday, it spilled over again.A brief exchange with Ziaire Williams ended with a double technical, and the league did not step in to soften the blow.The NBA made it official soon after. “Los Angeles Lakers guard Luka Doncic has been suspended one game without pay for receiving his 16th technical foul of the 2025–26 season,” the league announced. Sixteen technical fouls trigger an automatic suspension, and every two after that bring another ban.This one came during the third quarter against Brooklyn. Williams got in Doncic’s face, shouting after drawing a foul. Doncic reacted with a light push. Williams answered with a swipe, and officials handed out double technicals after review. Doncic did not agree with the decision. “He was yelling in my face three times,” he said. “I just wanted to get out of there. It's a double tech, of course. What can I say? I didn't even talk. I just wanted to get out of there. (The referee) said my push was exaggerated, which (it) was obviously not. I don't know what else to say.”There had been hope the league might rescind it, just as it did days earlier after an exchange with Goga Bitadze. That decision had saved him from suspension once. But there was no reversal. Doncic will now miss Monday’s game against the Washington Wizards.The Wizards sit near the bottom of the standings, and the Lakers have been rolling, winning 14 of their last 16. Doncic himself has been on a tear, averaging 37.2 points in March while shooting efficiently across the board.The bigger concern now is what comes next. Every two additional technical fouls will trigger another suspension. That leaves Doncic walking a fine line with only a handful of regular-season games left. One more emotional outburst could cost him again.There is a bit of breathing room. The technical count resets once the playoffs begin, and with seven games remaining, he would need two more technicals to face another suspension. It is not impossible, given his history with officials, but it is avoidable if he manages his reactions.Away from the court, the noise has only grown louder. Doncic is dealing with a difficult breakup with ex-fiancée Anamaria Goltes, along with an ongoing legal dispute over child support and jurisdiction.It is a heavy backdrop to what has otherwise been an elite stretch of basketball. For now, the Lakers can absorb one missed game. But it would be interesting to see whether Doncic can keep his focus steady when both the stakes and the pressure rise.
Article Summary: Luka doncic receives a one-game suspension following his 16th technical foul of the season. The los angeles lakers star had flirted with the line for weeks, picking up technical after technical while somehow staying just on the right side of a ban. That cushion is gone now.

Article Title: Highest paid NHL player Auston Matthews: Insights on Toronto Maple Leafs star contract and salary
Article Text:
Auston Matthews trade rumors swirl among NHL analysts as they predict a big trade by the Toronto Maple Leafs in 2026 (Image via Imagn Images)

Things to know about Toronto Maple Leafs' Auston Matthews NHL contract

Watch Instant Analysis: Auston Matthews Signs 4-Year/$13.25M Extension With Maple Leafs! Instant Analysis: Auston Matthews Signs 4-Year/$13.25M Extension With Maple Leafs!

With his most recent deal with the Toronto Maple Leafs, Auston Matthews is still the highest-paid player in the NHL, and from its profitable structure to its long-term effects, here's a closer look at what makes this contract unique and how it affects the franchise's future in ongoing NHL updates.After signing a huge contract extension with the Toronto Maple Leafs, Auston Matthews is once again in the news. The deal not only shows how valuable he is to the team, but it also sets a standard for how much players can make in the league.As the NHL changes with higher salary caps and more competitive rosters. Matthews' contract is a good deal for both his on-ice skills and his business. It also gets people talking in NHL news roundups and trade rumors about how teams spend their money to get the best players.One of the most notable aspects of Auston Matthews’ contract is its total value, $53 million over four years, running through the 2027–28 NHL season. This agreement gives him an average annual value (AAV) of $13.25 million, making him the highest-paid player in the league today.The contract is mostly about signing bonuses and not base salary, and Matthews, for example, has a low base salary in the 2025–26 season. But he gets a huge signing bonus that brings his total earnings for that year to more than $15 million, and this method gives you financial security and lets you be flexible within the NHL salary cap system.The deal also has a full no-movement clause (NMC), which is another important part. This means that the Toronto Maple Leafs can't trade, waive, or assign Matthews without his permission. These kinds of clauses are usually only given to top franchise players, which shows how important he is to the team.The contract is also in line with Matthews' long-term career goals, and he can re-enter free agency while still in his prime. All by choosing a four-year term instead of a deal that lasts the longest, and this could help him get another big contract as the league's income and salary caps keep going up.This deal has a big effect on the team as a whole. Getting Matthews is good for the top line, but it also puts pressure on the Toronto Maple Leafs to be careful with their salary cap. Finding a balance between star contracts and depth players is still a big problem, and NHL match previews and updates often talk about it.Matthews' deal has changed the way elite forwards are valued in the NHL as a whole, and other stars and their agents often use these kinds of contracts as examples when they are talking about trades and salaries in the NHL.As of now, Auston Matthews is still playing well enough to earn his record-breaking salary. He is always in the news for NHL games and league-wide analysis. All because he can always score goals and lead the Toronto Maple Leafs.
Article Summary: Auston matthews' contract extension makes him the highest-paid player in the nhl. The deal is worth $53 million over four years, running through the 2027–28 nhl season. It has a full no-movement clause (nmc), which means that the toronto maple leafs can't trade, waive, or assign matthews without his permission.

Article Title: Is Naomi Osaka retiring from tennis? Miami Open loss and emotional words about daughter Shai hint at a big decision
Article Text:
Is Naomi Osaka retiring from tennis? Miami Open loss and emotional words about daughter Shai hint at a big decision (Image via Getty)

Naomi Osaka opens up after Miami Open loss as she weighs tennis future and life with daughter Shai



The four-time Grand Slam champion Naomi Osaka shocked many fans at the 2026 Miami Open when she lost early in the tournament and then spoke openly about possibly stepping away from the sport. She was beaten by Australian qualifier Talia Gibson in straight sets, 5-7, 4-6, on Saturday, March 21. Right after the match, Osaka did not hide her feelings. She spoke honestly about her struggles and what really matters to her now. She made it clear that being a mother is no longer something she wants to balance at the cost of her happiness.“I’m not going to stay on tour if I’m losing in the first round… I’d rather just be a great mom and be there for my daughter,” Osaka said, as reported by Tennis Channel.At 28, Osaka is now thinking beyond just titles. Her daughter Shai, born in July 2023, has changed how she sees her career and her life.Naomi Osaka entered the tournament as the No. 16 seed and even had a first-round bye, so expectations were high. But the loss to world No. 68 Talia Gibson came as a surprise. Still, what followed mattered more than the result.She explained that while she still wants to win and compete at the highest level, she is not willing to lose time with her daughter just for tennis.“I want to win titles and I want to be the best player I can, but if I have to sacrifice having a lot of time with my daughter, I’d rather not do it,” she said.Even with these thoughts, Osaka has not fully decided to walk away. She shared her plans for the upcoming clay season and said she hopes to return in late April. She is aiming to play in Madrid, Rome, and the French Open. However, she also confirmed she will skip Charleston.This is not the first time Osaka has spoken about retirement. In an earlier interview with PEOPLE in 2025, she admitted she once thought she would stop playing after becoming a mother.“I was one of those people that thought when I had a kid I would stop playing tennis,” she said.But things changed during her pregnancy. She found new motivation and wanted her daughter to one day see her play.“Just seeing her makes my day brighter… She’s just such a positive influence in my life,” Osaka shared.Now, Osaka stands at a point where her love for tennis and her love for her family are both strong. What she chooses next could shape the final chapter of her career.
Article Summary: Naomi osaka lost in the first round of the 2026 miami open on saturday. She was beaten by australian qualifier talia gibson in straight sets, 5-7, 4-6. After the match, she spoke openly about possibly retiring from tennis. She said she would rather be a great mom and be there for her daughter shai.

Article Title: Baker Mayfield’s Tampa Bay Buccaneers linked to $118 million Washington Commanders linebacker
Article Text:
Tired of too many ads? go ad free now

NFL Trade Rumors: Baker Mayfield’s Buccaneers tied to Commanders LB Bobby Wagner

Tired of too many ads? go ad free now

Washington linebacker Bobby Wagner is just like Tampa Bay’s Lavonte David

The Tampa Bay Buccaneers lost legendary linebacker Lavonte David this week after he hung up his cleats. The Super Bowl champion was drafted in 2012 by Tampa Bay as the 58th overall pick in the second round. He recorded one Pro Bowl selection, one First-team All-Pro selection, and two Second-team All-Pro selections.David has bid goodbye to the gridiron after 14 glorious years. His retirement calls for someone who can take his place. Someone who shares a history with him. The Athletic’s Saad Yousuf picks Washington Commanders linebacker Bobby Wagner as the perfect fit for the Buccaneers.Yousuf urges Tampa Bay to sign Wagner in free agency. The Buccaneers did sign Alex Anzalone, but they still need to strengthen their middle of the defense. Tampa Bay picked David in 2012 at overall No. 58; eleven picks earlier, Wagner was picked at overall No. 47 by the then Russell Wilson-led Seattle Seahawks.The analyst reports that Wagner has turned his career into a likely Hall of Fame one. He may not play as well as he did in his prime, but he still has some juice left in his tank. As for his accolades, he is also a Super Bowl champion and has earned 10 Pro Bowl selections, six First-team All-Pro selections, and five Second-team All-Pro selections.He is a three-time NFL combined tackles leader and one-time NFL solo tackles co-leader. In 2025, he won the Walter Payton NFL Man of the Year despite Kansas City Chiefs star tight end Travis Kelce’s presence as one of the candidates.As for Commanders LB’s 2025 stats, he recorded 1132 total snaps [ranks first in PFF], 162 total tackles [79 solo], 4.5 sacks, 20 pressures, two interceptions, and two forced fumbles.Now, how would Wagner fit into Tampa Bay’s scenario?Sports Illustrated’s River Wells reports Wagner has a very high football IQ, just like David. However, the Buccaneers struggled with David in the past few seasons due to his age; he slowed down, and his coverage ability declined. His PFF coverage grade was 45.1, which ranked 69th among 88 qualified linebackers. The same could happen with the 35-year-old Washington linebacker.The PFF gave Wagner a 51.1 coverage grade, which ranked 51st among 88 qualified LBs. But it was the run defense grade that was impeccable [90.3], which ranked 5th at the position.His pass-rush grade was 92.4, which ranked 2nd among qualified linebackers. These stats may further fuel The Athletic’s prediction for Baker Mayfield-led Buccaneers. Will the contract negotiation lead to a deal?Heavy Sports’ Christopher Sheppard reports that Wagner may come on the cheap. He is estimated to make around $7.7M per year at the moment. For a team prioritizing low-risk approach when it comes to roster management, signing Wagner, who is just five years away from 40, could be the best option.According to Over The Cap, the veteran’s career APY [average per year] is $8M and his total earnings over 14 seasons are $118M.Several teams have been linked to Washington linebacker: the Los Angeles Rams, Buffalo Bills, and Atlanta Falcons. But it’s only the Tampa Bay Buccaneers that have the Lavonte David connection. So, would they sign Wagner in free agency? Remains to be seen…Stay updated with the latest IPL news on Times of India . Follow the IPL Schedule, check the IPL Points Table , and track the race for the IPL Orange Cap and IPL Purple Cap
Article Summary: Washington commanders linebacker bobby wagner is just like tampa bay’s lavonte david. David was drafted in 2012 by tampa bay as the 58th overall pick in the second round. Wagner has a very high football iq, just like david. The 35-year-old washington linebacker may come on the cheap.

Article Title: Hades 2: Xbox Partner Preview March 2026: Hades 2 gets a gonsole date, Stranger Than Heaven Spans five eras, and more announcements
Article Text:
Microsoft just held its Xbox Partner Preview showcase, revealing nearly 20 third-party games in 30 minutes. The biggest announcement was Hades 2 coming to Xbox and PS5 on April 14, available on Game Pass from day one. Ryu Ga Gotoku's Stranger Than Heaven got a new trailer confirming a five-era, five-city story structure. Other highlights included a STALKER 2 expansion, Dispatch's Xbox port, and Rebellion's new sci-fi title Alien Deathstorm.

Hades 2 is finally coming to Xbox—and PS5

Stranger Than Heaven goes big—five cities, five time periods

The Expanse: Osiris Reborn sets a beta date before its 2027 launch

STALKER 2 is getting its first major expansion this summer

Dispatch is finally making the jump to Xbox

The Atomfall team's next game involves aliens and very bad weather

Hunter: The Reckoning kicks off the World of Darkness again

Serious Sam makes a surprise comeback with a multiverse twist

Grave Seasons is a farming sim—with something dark underneath

Everything else from the showcase





The show also had a lot more packed into its 30 minutes.



Wuthering Waves, the free-to-play open-world action-RPG from Kuro Games, is coming to Xbox in July 2026.



Super Meat Boy 3D launches in just four days, on March 31, and will be on Game Pass.



Forever Ago, a quiet road trip narrative game from Annapurna Interactive, is coming to Xbox, PS5, and Switch 2 in fall 2026.



Ascend to Zero is a cyberpunk roguelite with time-manipulation combat, landing July 13.



Frog Sqwad—yes, that spelling—is an eight-player co-op puzzle game coming to Xbox in June.



Bluey's Happy Snaps is a photography adventure starring everyone's favourite blue heeler, out this fall.



Moosa: Dirty Fate is a third-person action game set in feudal Korea from the Gungrave G.O.R.E. developer, due in 2027.



The Eternal Life of Goldman is a hand-drawn platformer with a new demo available today.



Vaunted is a sci-fi tactical RPG with three unreliable narrators, coming later this year.



Artificial Detective, the showcase's closer, is a post-apocalyptic mystery game where you play as a robot trying to figure out what happened to humanity—out in 2027.



Microsoft just wrapped up its latest Xbox Partner, a 30-minute showcase dedicated entirely to third-party games. Nearly 20 titles were on show, ranging from a new Yakuza-style epic to a Bluey photography game for kids. No Persona 4 Revival date. No Witcher 3 DLC. But there was still plenty to talk about.Here's everything announced.The headline announcement: Hades 2 is leaving its Nintendo Switch 2 and PC exclusivity behind. Supergiant's critically acclaimed roguelike sequel hits Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, and Cloud on April 14. It will also launch on PlayStation 5 on the same date. The game will be available through Xbox Game Pass from day one.The showcase's most substantial showing came from Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio, the team behind the Like a Dragon series. Their new IP, Stranger Than Heaven, is shaping up to be seriously ambitious. The new trailer confirmed the game spans five distinct historical eras across five cities—expect the same chaotic combat and obsessive attention to detail that made the Yakuza games a cult staple. No release date yet, but Xbox is hosting a dedicated showcase for the game on May 6.Owlcat Games brought new gameplay for The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, a third-person action-RPG set in the TV show's universe. You play a custom captain building out a crew—think Mass Effect with an Expanse coat of paint. A closed beta kicks off on April 22. The full game is targeting a Spring 2027 release, and it'll land on Xbox Game Pass at launch.GSC Game World announced Cost of Hope, the first big DLC for STALKER 2: Heart of Chornobyl. The expansion centers on a conflict between the Freedom and Duty factions and takes players into the Chornobyl Nuclear Power Plant itself. The studio says it's packing in over 20 hours of new content. It's launching this summer across all platforms.AdHoc Studio's superhero workplace drama Dispatch was one of the standout games of 2025, and it's now confirmed for Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, and Cloud this summer. The full episodic run—about a former superhero stuck dispatching a team of reformed supervillains—will be available as an Xbox Play Anywhere title.Rebellion, the studio behind last year's Atomfall and the long-running Sniper Elite series, unveiled its next project: Alien Deathstorm. It's a first-person survival adventure set on an off-world colony battered by freak storms and overrun by hostile aliens. The tone looks genuinely unsettling. It'll hit Xbox Game Pass as a day-one title when it launches in 2027.The show opened with the world premiere of Hunter: The Reckoning – Deathwish, a first-person action game set in the World of Darkness universe—the same fictional world that houses Vampire: The Masquerade. You're hunting a vampire who's gone undercover as a cop. Nacon is publishing it, and it's due out in Summer 2027 for Xbox and PC.Nobody was really expecting a new Serious Sam game, but here we are. Serious Sam: Shatterverse brings together five alternate versions of Sam Stone, each with their own distinct abilities, to take down the series' signature villain, Mental. The series' trademark over-the-top gunplay is back, and it's launching later this year on Xbox, PS5, and PC.From developer Perfect Garbage and publisher Blumhouse Games comes Grave Seasons, a cozy farming sim that's clearly not as wholesome as it looks. The August 14 release will land on Xbox Game Pass on day one. A demo is also on the way soon, if you want to get a feel for whatever it's hiding beneath that pastoral surface.
Article Summary: Microsoft just held its xbox partner preview showcase, a 30-minute showcase dedicated entirely to third-party games. The biggest announcement was hades 2 coming to xbox and ps5 on april 14. Other highlights included a stalker 2 expansion, dispatch's xbox port, and rebellion's new sci-fi title alien deathstorm.

Article Title: IPL: No Bethell or Padikkal for RCB as defending champions opt to bowl against SRH; check both teams playing XI
Article Text:
Virat Kohli

Playing XI of both teams:

Sunrisers Hyderabad (Playing XI): Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan(w/c), Heinrich Klaasen, Aniket Verma, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Salil Arora, Harsh Dubey, Harshal Patel, Jaydev Unadkat, Eshan Malinga.

Royal Challengers Bengaluru (Playing XI): Virat Kohli, Philip Salt, Rajat Patidar(c), Jitesh Sharma(w), Tim David, Romario Shepherd, Krunal Pandya, Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Abhinandan Singh, Jacob Duffy, Suyash Sharma.

NEW DELHI: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) on Saturday won the toss and decided to field against the Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) in the tournament opener at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium.Interestingly, England batter Jacob Bethell and Indian left-handed batter Devdutt Padikkal were not included in the RCB playing XI.After winning the toss, RCB captain Rajat Patidar said they will try their best to put a second star on the jersey."We'll bowl first. Of course, there are a lot of positives from last year, but as we go into this season, we are not defending; we'll try to be champions again in 2026.I think there are a lot of good players in the side and we have proper backups for every position. There's a good support system and medical team as well. So yeah, everyone is fit and looking forward to this game. Thank you so much for supporting us over the years. We'll try our best to put a second star on our jersey. There are two new faces - Jacob Duffy and Abhinandan Singh, who are going to play their first match," Patidar said.Meanwhile, Hyderabad stand-in skipper Ishan Kishan said they will try to execute their plans against the defending champions.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) won the toss and decided to field against the sunrisers hyderabad (srh) in the tournament opener at the m. chinnaswamy stadium. Rcb captain rajat patidar said they will try their best to put a second star on the jersey.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Who is Abhinandan Singh? Meet RCB’s debutant who dismissed Virat Kohli twice
Article Text:
Royal Challengers Bengaluru's Virat Kohli, right, and Abhinandan Singh (PTI Photo/Shailendra Bhojak)

Watch RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update

Royal Challengers Bengaluru

Poll Which player do you think has the most to prove in the upcoming season? Virat Kohli Bhuvneshwar Kumar Abhinandan Singh Jacob Duffy

Sunrisers Hyderabad

Abhinandan Singh has emerged as a new name in the Indian Premier League after being handed his debut by Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the 2026 season opener against Sunrisers Hyderabad at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium.The right-arm pacer from Uttar Pradesh has taken a quick rise in the game. Four years ago, he was playing tennis-ball cricket. He is now part of RCB’s playing XI in one of the biggest matches of the season. The medium fast bowler proved to be impressive in the Uttar Pradesh T20 League where he claimed 15 wickets in 11 games while representing the Lucknow Falcons.Abhinandan had already impressed within the RCB camp before the season. He dismissed Virat Kohli in both intra-squad practice matches, which brought him into contention for a spot in the XI.RCB’s pace attack has been affected by multiple absences. Josh Hazlewood is injured, while Yash Dayal has been ruled out of the season. Nuwan Thushara is unavailable due to not receiving an NOC. This opened up a place alongside senior bowlers like Bhuvneshwar Kumar and Jacob Duffy.The match also marked the return of cricket to the venue after the stampede during RCB’s title celebrations last year that resulted in 11 deaths. Players wore black armbands as a mark of respect and had trained in No.11 jerseys ahead of the game.Abhinandan’s selection comes at a time when the team needed a reliable option in its pace unit. His debut marks the start of his journey at the IPL level.(Playing XI): Virat Kohli, Philip Salt, Rajat Patidar(c), Jitesh Sharma(w), Tim David, Romario Shepherd, Krunal Pandya, Bhuvneshwar Kumar, Abhinandan Singh, Jacob Duffy, Suyash Sharma(Playing XI): Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head, Ishan Kishan(w/c), Heinrich Klaasen, Aniket Verma, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Salil Arora, Harsh Dubey, Harshal Patel, Jaydev Unadkat, Eshan Malinga
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru take on sunrisers hyderabad. Abhinandan singh makes his ipl debut for rcb. The right-arm pacer from uttar pradesh has taken a quick rise in the game. Josh hazlewood is injured, while yash dayal is ruled out. Nuwan thushara is unavailable due to not receiving an noc.

Article Title: Jaylen Brown Injury Update: Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles injury: How serious is it? Breaking down the risk for Boston
Article Text:
Image - X

Jaylen Brown ruled out with Achilles tendinitis as Celtics take playoff-first approach



In the world of the Boston Celtics, there is no word more terrifying than "Achilles." On Friday, that fear became a reality for the Green Team’s faithful when All-Star Jaylen Brown was officially ruled out for a pivotal matchup against the Atlanta Hawks.What started as a seemingly minor report of "left calf tightness" on Thursday was downgraded just hours before tip-off to left Achilles tendinitis. For a fan base that has spent the better part of a year watching Jayson Tatum recover from an Achilles rupture, the news felt like a cruel case of déjà vu.The first thing fans need to understand is the difference between tendinitis and a tear. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break.It is a common "overuse" injury for explosive athletes like Brown, who rely on jumping and quick lateral movements.While it is not a season-ending injury, it is a significant "red flag." If left untreated, chronic tendinitis can weaken the tendon, making it more susceptible to a serious rupture. By sitting Brown against the Hawks, the Celtics medical staff is choosing a "better safe than sorry" approach, prioritizing the upcoming 2026 playoffs over a late-March regular-season win.There is a silver lining for Brown’s individual accolades. Just before this injury sidelined him, Brown officially played his 65th game of the season. Under the NBA’s current rules, this makes him eligible for season-end awards like MVP and All-NBA.Brown has been the undisputed engine of the Celtics' offense this year, averaging a career-high 28.6 points per game. Having already hit that 65-game mark, both Brown and the Celtics now have the luxury of being extremely cautious with his recovery without worrying about his eligibility for the honors he has clearly earned.With Brown sidelined, the pressure shifts back to Jayson Tatum, who is still working his way back into a full rhythm after his own Achilles journey. The Celtics are currently battling the New York Knicks for the No. 2 seed in the Eastern Conference, and every game counts.However, the team knows that a "Banner 19" run is impossible without a healthy Jaylen Brown. Expect the Celtics to use the "RICE" method (Rest, Ice, Compression, and Elevation) aggressively over the next week. While the word "Achilles" will always cause a panic in Boston, this move appears to be a calculated decision to ensure that the "Jays" are both standing tall when the postseason begins in April.
Article Summary: Jaylen brown ruled out with achilles tendinitis as celtics take playoff-first approach. Tendinitis is essentially inflammation, the body’s way of saying the tendon is overworked and needs a break. The celtics are currently battling the new york knicks for the no. 2 seed in the eastern conference.

Article Title: Emma Bates: Who is Emma Bates? US marathon runner pregnancy revelation triggers UCan dispute as timeline clash raises serious questions
Article Text:
Who is Emma Bates? US marathon runner pregnancy revelation triggers UCan dispute as timeline clash raises serious questions (Image via Getty)

Emma Bates and UCan dispute over pregnancy claim brings back past issues faced by Alysia Montaño and Allyson Felix





Emma Bates has made a serious claim, and it has quickly caught attention across the running world. The American marathon runner said her longtime sponsor, UCan, dropped her soon after she told them she was pregnant. Bates, who is 33, shared this in a social media video on Tuesday, saying she has now been trying new energy gels after losing that deal. She had worked with the company for three years. But according to her, things changed right after she shared her pregnancy news. Bates had announced on March 5 that she and her partner, runner Steve Finley, are expecting a baby. What makes this even more surprising is that she had already run the Valencia Marathon while in the early stage of her pregnancy, finishing with a time of 2:25:51.However, UCan has strongly pushed back on her claim and shared a very different version of what happened.UCan said the decision to end its partnership with Emma Bates was made in September 2025, months before they knew about her pregnancy. In a statement, the company said this was part of normal business planning. They also said they offered her a new deal, but she chose not to accept it.Bates’ representative, Matt Sonnenfeldt from Flynn Sports Management, told Front Office Sports that talks continued even after September.He said the company made an offer in December and later changed it, which does not match UCan’s timeline.Emma Bates is one of the top long-distance runners in the United States. She finished second at the Chicago Marathon 2021 and placed eighth at the Boston Marathon last year. Her personal best of 2:23:18 ranks among the fastest in US history.She also works with Asics, which confirmed to Front Office Sports that her contract stays the same during her pregnancy. The company said it supports athletes through pregnancy and their return to racing.This situation has brought back memories of past cases. Runner Alysia Montaño once raced while eight months pregnant and later spoke out against Nike for not supporting her financially during that time. She later moved to Asics but said her pay was still reduced when her performance dropped.Olympian Allyson Felix also shared in a 2019 New York Times article that Nike wanted to cut her pay by 70 percent after she became a mother. She described it as a “terrifying time” while dealing with contract talks and a difficult pregnancy.After these stories became public, many companies reviewed how they treat female athletes during pregnancy. Now, Emma Bates’ case is again raising the same questions about support, fairness, and trust between athletes and sponsors.
Article Summary: Us marathon runner emma bates said her longtime sponsor, ucan, dropped her soon after she told them she was pregnant. Bates had already run the valencia marathon while in the early stage of her pregnancy. Ucan has strongly pushed back on her claim and shared a very different version of what happened.
